author: kd9lsv
description: ESPHome is a system to control your microcontrollers by simple yet powerful configuration files and control them remotely through Home Automation systems.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- 2026.5.1 includes fixes from the ESPHome 2026.5 release cycle.
- Updates zeroconf dependency versions used by ESPHome.
- Includes upstream maintenance and bug fixes for the ESPHome dashboard/runtime.
